replies.msg: 邊個舒服啲同好啲？

邊個舒服啲同好啲？

CX
BA 歐洲內陸既business 同econ 張櫈一撚樣

如果你去倫敦 唔理乜class都係CX好d

上次坐BA係787 好睇唔好食
好似好新奇可以較窗既色調 張床設計又唔同

但放野既枱係overlap訓覺位置 好易整倒水




CX用777 感覺上寬 講野食都好d

一定CX
雖然CX啲空姐
CX

仲有樣野BA永遠無得比係airport lounge
有時好唔好彩delay就會體會到lounge有幾重要
BA個d好孤寒得沙律 1,2樣主食

但CX 特別係倫敦上年年尾新lounge有點心 noodle bar 西餐
又多獨立位有私人空間

處女點正法?

除非你肯定唔會改出發日期
否則千祈唔好經online agent買
因為改時間係好好好好難

如果直航單程最平係cx 同上面巴quote一樣
如果來回轉機最平就卡塔爾航空連稅8k港幣

如果下年六月返嚟放完暑假會返過去
咁今次買單程 六月果次先買來回
因為到時對日子會比較有把握
來回機票較短有效期 亦會平d

Please note that BA 歐洲內陸 flights will no longer offer complimentary food and drink. You need to pay for your own food and drink.

I was on a BA European flight recently, and I remember that a can of coke cost £1.80 while a hot bacon roll is £4.95.

You can only pay for your food and drink on board using a credit or debit card. No cash allowed.

如果係abu dhabi轉機，可唔可以帶laptop上機？

如果係abu dhabi轉機，可唔可以帶laptop上機？

可以. 不過嚮香港check in 時再問ground staff多次

United Kingdom: Since March 2017, nonstop flights on all airlines bound for the U.K. from the following six countries – Turkey, Lebanon, Egypt, Saudi Arabia, Jordan, Tunisia – have been subject to in-flight electronics restrictions. The restrictions state that phones, laptops, tablets and electronics accessories – such as keyboards, power supplies and external hard drives – must be smaller than 16 c.m. x 9.3 c.m. X 1.5 c.m. Most popular smartphones fit within those limits.
